text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year, and the Arima Kinen has
arrived. T.M. Opera O, Meisho Doto, and Admire
Vega all gather for the winter Grand Prix.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road was also selected to run in the
race. She steps into the paddock with her peers
amidst the roar of the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega speaks for a moment before
stopping herself. Words are no longer needed.
Surely they'll converse plenty on the racecourse.
